NAME: FANTOM3 — Mouse gene catalog based on physical cDNAs
DESCRIPTION: FANTOM3 transcript annotation producing the mouse gene catalog based on physical cDNAs. Extended the cDNA collection and provided comprehensive transcript annotation, distinguishing protein-coding from non-coding RNAs and revealing the complexity of the mammalian transcriptome.
TITLE: Transcript Annotation in FANTOM3: Mouse Gene Catalog Based on Physical cDNAs
